name: agents-cloud
description: Autonomous AI agent cloud platform foundation workspace.

scripts.infra:synth: pnpm control-api:build && AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-agents-cloud-source} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-us-east-1} AGENTS_CLOUD_AWS_REGION=${AGENTS_CLOUD_AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} pnpm --filter @agents-cloud/infra-cdk run synth
scripts.infra:diff: pnpm control-api:build && AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-agents-cloud-source} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-us-east-1} AGENTS_CLOUD_AWS_REGION=${AGENTS_CLOUD_AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} pnpm --filter @agents-cloud/infra-cdk run diff
scripts.infra:deploy: pnpm control-api:build && AWS_PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-agents-cloud-source} AWS_REGION=${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=${AWS_DEFAULT_REGION:-us-east-1} AGENTS_CLOUD_AWS_REGION=${AGENTS_CLOUD_AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} pnpm --filter @agents-cloud/infra-cdk run deploy
